heading: Maps and descriptions
label: 460vv–2 Maps and descriptions
text: As soon as practicable after , the Secretary of Agriculture shall file the maps referred to in and legal descriptions of each wilderness area designated by with the Committee on Interior and Insular Affairs and the Committee on Agriculture of the United States House of Representatives and the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry of the United States Senate. Each such map and legal description shall have the same force and effect as if included in this subchapter; except that correction of clerical and typographical errors in such legal descriptions and maps may be made. Each such map and legal description shall be on file and available for public inspection in the Office of the Chief of the Forest Service, Department of Agriculture.October 18, 1988section 460vv–1 of this titlesection 460vv–1 of this title
notes: Change of NameCommittee on Interior and Insular Affairs of the House of Representatives changed to Committee on Natural Resources of the House of Representatives on , by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Third Congress.Jan. 5, 1993
